purpose: Discriminative closed-loop suite: break all-PASS / all-FAIL deadlock

A_frontier.note: Expected model splits (some PASS some FAIL). Primary ranking.

cases.name: mass_x2_s045
cases.why: NN-2 often PASS; P1/P2/P2H often FAIL — grip-saturation vs policy

cases.name: mass_x4_s045
cases.why: Near gate; P2 may partial while others PASS

cases.name: mass_x2_s042
cases.why: P2H OOD fail; NN-2/P1/P2 still PASS

cases.name: friction_s045
cases.why: P2H (heavy-only train) FAIL; friction-trained models PASS

cases.name: mass_x4_div2_g012
cases.why: Tight grip; P2 FAIL, NN-2/P1/P2H PASS

cases.name: mass_x2_div2_g010
cases.why: Very tight grip; P2H FAIL, NN-2/P1 PASS

cases.name: mass_x8_s045_g015
cases.why: P1/P2 PASS; NN-2/P2H FAIL — economy + wrist help

B_economy.note: All strong models PASS; rank by grip economy + lift margin.

C_envelope.note: Physics floor: expect ALL FAIL. Regression if any unexpectedly PASSes without envelope change.
